reference: Hello, it is better to avoid medication during pregnancy. Your symptoms indicate that you have a urinary infection and not a vaginal infection. It is better to perform a routine urinalysis and culture test and then decide on medication. Blindly taking Clingen is not a good idea.
text: Hello, it is better to avoid medication during pregnancy. Your symptoms indicate that urinary infection and not a vaginal infection. It is better to perform a routine urinalysis and culture test and then decide on medication. Blindly taking Klingon is not a good idea.
